Access yield through Cores.

Cores package multiple Solana yield sources into clear allocation paths. Accumulate SOL with Auto Stack and track every position from one account.

Cores

Compare curated Solana yield allocations by APY, risk, liquidity, source mix, and strategy intent.

Auto Stack

Accumulate SOL over time while unfilled capital continues earning yield before execution.

Account

Manage positions, pending executions, allocations, activity, and earnings from one account.

build conviction

SolStacker

SolStacker organizes Solana strategies into curated Cores, helping users allocate, accumulate, and track yield from one Account.
